title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: Smuggling rares onto the battlefield.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a red/green Smuggler's Surprise deck, featuring Calamity, Galloping Inferno, Overlord of the Boilerbilges and Overlord of the Hauntwoods from Duskmourn in Standard.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD
